languages.text: The {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Strafe{/g} ability can be used to ram enemy ships at 90% {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} of the regular {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Voidship Ram{/g} ability and without the bonus damage from distance travelled.

traits.locale_text: The Strafe ability can be used to ram enemy ships with 80% damage of the regular Voidship Ram and without the bonus damage for the distance between the flagship and the target.

languages.text: Die Fähigkeit {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Manöverangriff{/g} kann eingesetzt werden, um Feindschiffe mit 90 % {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} der regulären {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Raumschiff-Rammbock{/g}-Fähigkeit und ohne den Bonus-Schaden der zurückgelegten Distanz zu rammen.

traits.locale_text: Die {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} Manöverangriff kann eingesetzt werden, um Feindschiffe mit 80 % Schaden der regulären Raumschiff-Rammbock-Fähigkeit und ohne den {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Zusatzschaden{/g} der zurückgelegten Distanz zu rammen.

languages.text: La capacité {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Déplacement latéral{/g} peut être utilisée pour éperonner les vaisseaux ennemis à hauteur de 90 % des {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de la capacité {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Bélier de vaisseau spatial{/g} standard et sans le bonus de dégâts lié à la distance parcourue.
languages.original_text: The {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Strafe{/g} ability can be used to ram enemy ships at 90% {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} of the regular {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Voidship Ram{/g} ability and without the bonus damage from distance travelled.

traits.locale_text: La {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} Mitraillage peut être utilisée pour éperonner les vaisseaux ennemis à 80% des dégâts de la capacité Bélier de Vaisseau Amiral normale et sans le {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de dégâts de la distance parcourue.

La capacité Mitraillage peut être utilisée pour éperonner les vaisseaux ennemis à 80% des {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de la capacité Bélier de Vaisseau Amiral normale et sans le bonus de dégâts de la distance parcourue.

languages.text: {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}侧向平移{/g}能力可以用来撞击敌方舰船，造成的伤害等同于{g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}舰船撞角{/g}常规{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}伤害{/g}的90%，侧向撞击没有移动距离带来的伤害加成。
languages.original_text: The {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Strafe{/g} ability can be used to ram enemy ships at 90% {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} of the regular {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Voidship Ram{/g} ability and without the bonus damage from distance travelled.

traits.locale_text: 侧向平移能力可以用来撞击敌方舰船，造成的伤害等同于舰船撞角常规{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}伤害{/g}的90%，侧向撞击没有移动距离带来的伤害加成。

languages.text: La capacidad {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Desplazamiento lateral{/g} puede utilizarse para embestir a naves enemigas para realizar un 90 % del {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}daño{/g} de la capacidad {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Ariete de nave del vacío{/g} normal y sin la bonificación al daño por la distancia recorrida.
languages.original_text: The {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Strafe{/g} ability can be used to ram enemy ships at 90% {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} of the regular {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Voidship Ram{/g} ability and without the bonus damage from distance travelled.

traits.locale_text: La {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} Desplazamiento lateral puede utilizarse para embestir a naves enemigas para realizar un 80 % del daño de la capacidad Ariete de nave del vacío normal y sin la {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificación{/g} al daño por la distancia recorrida.

languages.text: ストレイフアビリティを使用すると、通常のヴォイドシップ・ラムアビリティの90%の{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}で敵船に突撃できるが移動距離によるボーナスダメージは付かない。
languages.original_text: The Strafe ability can be used to ram enemy ships at 90% {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} of the regular Voidship Ram ability and without the bonus damage from distance travelled.

traits.locale_text: ストレイフアビリティを使用すると、通常のヴォイドシップ・ラムアビリティの90%の{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}で敵船に突撃できるが移動距離によるボーナスダメージは付かない。

languages.text: {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Yanlamasına İlerleyiş{/g} kabiliyeti, {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Uçsuz Gemisi Koçbaşı Vuruşu{/g} kabiliyetinin normalde verdiğinin %90'u {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}hasarla{/g} ve katedilen mesafenin sağladığı bonus hasar olmadan düşman gemilerine çarpmak için kullanılabilir.
languages.original_text: The {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Strafe{/g} ability can be used to ram enemy ships at 90% {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} of the regular {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Voidship Ram{/g} ability and without the bonus damage from distance travelled.

traits.locale_text: {g|f:1e61d88162a34f898f4c961b757a8b57}Yanlamasına İlerleyiş{/g} kabiliyeti, {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Uçsuz Gemisi Koçbaşı Vuruşu{/g} kabiliyetinin normalde verdiğinin %90'u {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}hasarla{/g} ve katedilen mesafenin sağladığı bonus hasar olmadan düşman gemilerine çarpmak için kullanılabilir.
